mcps.name: Office MCP
mcps.app_hint: Start the Office MCP server that exposes Word, PowerPoint, and Excel tools.

mcps.name: CAD MCP
mcps.app_hint: Open the target drawing in AutoCAD, GstarCAD, or ZWCAD before calling CAD tools.

mcps.name: HWP MCP
mcps.app_hint: Open Hancom HWP and keep the HWP MCP server running.

mcps.name: Photoshop MCP
mcps.app_hint: Open Photoshop and the target document before calling Photoshop tools.

mcps.name: Blender MCP
mcps.app_hint: Start Blender and its MCP addon before calling Blender tools.

mcps.name: Local Code MCP
mcps.app_hint: Run the Local Code MCP HTTP endpoint (e.g. via mcp-proxy) and set its allowed_roots to the folders you want editable. No desktop app required. Adjust local_port or local_url to your endpoint.

mcps.name: OpenCrab MCP
mcps.app_hint: Run the OpenCrab stdio MCP through an HTTP MCP proxy at /mcp. Example target command: opencrab serve or python -m opencrab.mcp.server from C:/scratch/OpenCrab. Adjust local_port or local_url to your endpoint.
